mapper.select: SELECT t1.* FROM consultation_record t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT session_id, MAX(created_time) as max_time FROM consultation_record WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY session_id ORDER BY max_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit} ) t2 ON t1.session_id = t2.session_id AND t1.created_time = t2.max_time WHERE t1.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t1.created_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) FROM consultation_record WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT t1.* FROM consultation_record t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT session_id, MAX(created_time) as max_time FROM consultation_record WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 AND (question LIKE #{keyword1} OR answer LIKE #{keyword2}) GROUP BY session_id ORDER BY max_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit} ) t2 ON t1.session_id = t2.session_id AND t1.created_time = t2.max_time WHERE t1.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t1.created_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) FROM consultation_record WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 AND (question LIKE #{keyword1} OR answer LIKE #{keyword2})
